title: Epic Spell Compendium
source_description: Second-pass transcription and conservative PF1e stat-block reconstruction from five handwritten campaign-reference pages.

verification_policy.direct: Visible numbers, ranges, durations, save clauses, costs, and effects are preserved.
verification_policy.reconstructed: Omitted fields may be conservatively inherited from a clear PF1e base spell and are labeled reconstructed.
verification_policy.unspecified: Fields without a safe basis remain not specified.

important_transcription_notes: Death Stare appears to be an inserted “14A” entry between Divine Name and Hell Fireball.
The Firestorm area notation is interpreted as two 10-foot cubes per caster level, matching PF1e fire storm notation.
Epic Particulate Form reads 20 minutes/level on the arcane page. The divine page appears to read 40 minutes/level, but the first digit is partly obscured.
Mass Dominate Monster is crossed out on the level 11 arcane page but is clearly present on the level 11 divine page.
Epic Finger of Death contains two separate save clauses; its exact resolution needs GM confirmation.

Level 11 Arcane.name: Mass Dominate Monster (crossed out at top of source page)

spells.name: Create Master Undead
spells.components: V, S, M; gemstone worth 500 gp per Hit Die (cost is direct)
spells.target_area: One corpse suitable for the chosen undead form
spells.duration: Instantaneous; control is ongoing until lost or superseded
spells.rules_text: Creates a vampire, death knight, or lesser lich under the caster’s control. The material cost is a gemstone worth 500 gp per Hit Die of the created undead.
spells.reconstruction_note: Effect and cost are directly transcribed. Unwritten fields follow create greater undead.

spells.name: Epic Magic Missile
spells.target_area: Up to 10 creatures; missiles can be divided among targets (reconstructed)
spells.rules_text: Fires 10 magic missiles that are treated as maximized, empowered, and quickened. If a spell-resistance check fails, reroll the failed spell-penetration check; if the reroll also fails, the affected missile bounces to a new opponent.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, action, number of missiles, metamagic treatment, reroll, and bounce rule are direct. Other fields follow magic missile.

spells.name: Summon Monster X
spells.rules_text: Summons one CR 18 monster. The exact eligible creature list is not included in the handwritten pages.
spells.reconstruction_note: The CR and quantity are direct; other fields follow the summon monster line.

spells.name: Enchant Item
spells.school: Not specified; likely transmutation or universal
spells.rules_text: Uses 10,000 gp worth of components to enchant any masterwork item as a +1 magic item.
spells.reconstruction_note: All substantive rules are direct. School, casting time, and exact range are absent from the source.

spells.name: Raise Dead
spells.rules_text: Use the standard Pathfinder raise dead spell. The handwritten page says “See Cleric Description.”
spells.reconstruction_note: Standard PF1e spell entry.

spells.name: Perfect Resurrection
spells.components: V, S, M/DF; 20,000 gp material cost (direct cost)
spells.rules_text: Witch only. Functions as true resurrection, but costs 20,000 gp. The note adds that “anything can be used,” apparently removing or relaxing the normal need for remains.
spells.reconstruction_note: Core effect, Witch restriction, cost, and remains note are direct; other fields follow true resurrection.

spells.name: Cloak of the Gods
spells.rules_text: Grants damage reduction 15/-.
spells.reconstruction_note: DR and duration are direct. Unwritten fields are conservative suggestions.

spells.name: Master Finished Work I
spells.casting_time: 1 round per 10 cubic feet of material (reconstructed)
spells.target_area: Raw materials sufficient for the finished item
spells.rules_text: Transforms raw material into one complete finished item up to 20 feet by 20 feet by 20 feet in size.
spells.reconstruction_note: Effect and maximum size are direct; other fields follow fabricate.

spells.name: Fog of Death
spells.rules_text: Creates a vast fog that deals damage as cloudkill.
spells.reconstruction_note: Damage reference, range, cloud dimensions, and duration are direct. Save and school follow cloudkill.

spells.name: Firestorm I
spells.target_area: Two 10-ft. cubes/level (notation interpreted from the handwritten “2 × 10-ft. cubes/level”)
spells.rules_text: Deals 20d6 points of fire damage throughout the selected area.
spells.reconstruction_note: Damage, range, area notation, and duration are direct or directly interpreted. Other fields follow fire storm.

spells.name: Create Gate / Teleport Circle
spells.range: 0 ft.; portal originates at the caster (reconstructed)
spells.target_area: A portal/circle to another location on the same plane
spells.rules_text: Creates a portal to another location within the same plane.
spells.reconstruction_note: Effect and duration are direct. Remaining fields follow teleportation circle.

spells.name: Master Mending
spells.rules_text: Repairs 200 hit points of damage.
spells.reconstruction_note: Action and repair amount are direct; other fields follow make whole.

spells.name: Sleep of the Dead
spells.target_area: One creature with 20 Hit Dice or fewer (direct)
spells.rules_text: Puts the target into magical sleep for 1d4 days.
spells.reconstruction_note: Target limit, duration, save, SR, and range are direct. School and casting details are suggested from sleep effects.

spells.name: Divine Name
spells.components: 15,000 gp sacrifice (direct); other components not specified
spells.target_area: One creature about whom the caster has at least minor knowledge
spells.rules_text: Reveals the creature’s birth name. The note explicitly says that the birth name is not necessarily the creature’s given name. The caster must possess minor knowledge of the creature.
spells.reconstruction_note: Effect, cost, and knowledge prerequisite are direct. Other fields are absent.

spells.name: Death Stare
spells.rules_text: The target dies on a failed Fortitude save.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, save, SR, and death effect are direct. Remaining fields are suggested.

spells.name: Hell Fireball
spells.rules_text: Deals 10d6 fire damage plus 10d6 acid damage.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, radius, and damage are direct; other fields follow fireball.

spells.name: Epic Shield I
spells.rules_text: Creates a force shield that grants a +10 shield bonus to AC.
spells.reconstruction_note: Bonus and duration are direct; other fields follow shield.

spells.name: Epic True Strike
spells.rules_text: Grants a +20 insight bonus on all attack rolls for the duration.
spells.reconstruction_note: Bonus, scope, and duration are direct; other fields follow true strike.

spells.name: Epic Shadow Evocation
spells.saving_throw: Will disbelief; additional saves as the duplicated spell
spells.rules_text: Duplicates an 8th-level or lower evocation spell. A creature that successfully disbelieves still takes 50% of the spell’s damage or effect.
spells.reconstruction_note: Maximum spell level and 50% reality are direct. Other fields follow greater shadow evocation.

spells.name: Epic Stunning Barrier
spells.rules_text: Grants a +5 untyped bonus to AC and a +5 untyped bonus on saving throws. Up to 20 creatures that attack you—by melee attack, ranged attack, or spell—can be stunned. Each opponent can trigger only one stun attempt from a given casting.
spells.reconstruction_note: All major mechanics are direct. School and basic casting fields follow stunning barrier.

spells.name: Form of Giant II
spells.rules_text: Transforms the caster to Gargantuan size and grants +8 Strength, +8 Constitution, -4 Dexterity, and +8 natural armor.
spells.reconstruction_note: Duration, size, and ability/armor adjustments are direct. Other fields follow giant form.

spells.name: Armor to Death
spells.target_area: One creature or soul; not specified
spells.duration: Until discharged, dispelled, or the caster dies (suggested from text)
spells.rules_text: Prevents the affected soul from being resurrected. It can be countered by wish, miracle, or the death of the caster.
spells.reconstruction_note: Effect and counters are direct. All other fields are absent.

spells.name: Epic Heal
spells.saving_throw: Will half when used offensively; harmless otherwise (reconstructed)
spells.rules_text: Heals 20 hit points per caster level, to a maximum of 500 hit points.
spells.reconstruction_note: Healing amount, cap, and range are direct. Other fields follow heal.

spells.name: Epic Shield of Faith
spells.rules_text: Grants a +10 deflection bonus to AC.
spells.reconstruction_note: Bonus and duration are direct. Other fields follow shield of faith.

spells.name: Epic Harm
spells.rules_text: Deals 20 points of negative-energy damage per caster level, to a maximum of 500 hit points.
spells.reconstruction_note: Damage, cap, negative-energy notation, and range are direct. Other fields follow harm.

spells.name: Creeping Doom
spells.saving_throw: Not specified; likely Reflex-based for entanglement
spells.rules_text: Entangles opponents in the area. Barbs inflict 1d6 points of Strength damage each round.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, area, entanglement, and Strength damage are direct. Other fields are absent.

spells.name: Firestorm II
spells.rules_text: Functions as Firestorm I, including 20d6 fire damage, but persists for 1d6 rounds.
spells.reconstruction_note: The handwritten text says “same as Firestorm I” and directly changes the duration.

spells.name: Mass Dominate Monster
spells.spell_list: Divine 11; Arcane 11 (name appears crossed out on the arcane page)
spells.rules_text: Functions as dominate monster against one target per caster level.
spells.reconstruction_note: Target count and base-spell reference are direct. The arcane appearance is crossed out, so list access should be confirmed.

spells.name: Summon Monster XI
spells.rules_text: Summons one CR 22 monster. The handwritten page labels this as an inserted “1.5” entry.
spells.reconstruction_note: CR and quantity are direct; other fields follow the summon monster line.

spells.name: Master Finished Work II
spells.casting_time: 1 round per 10 cubic feet of material (reconstructed)
spells.target_area: Raw materials sufficient for the finished item(s)
spells.rules_text: Functions as Master Finished Work I, but can create either one item up to 25 feet by 25 feet by 25 feet, or two items each up to 10 feet by 10 feet by 10 feet.
spells.reconstruction_note: Effect and sizes are directly interpreted from the cubic notation. Other fields follow fabricate.

spells.name: Enchant Item II
spells.school: Not specified; likely transmutation or universal
spells.rules_text: Creates a +2 magic item. The handwritten note lists a 15,000 gp sacrifice.
spells.reconstruction_note: Bonus and cost are direct. The divine list calls the spell “Epic Enchant Item II.”

spells.name: Epic Particulate Form
spells.components: V, S, M (a pinch of fine sand)
spells.target_area: One creature/level, no two more than 30 ft. apart
spells.duration: Arcane note: 20 minutes/level. Divine note appears to read 40 minutes/level, but the first digit is partly obscured.
spells.rules_text: Functions as particulate form: targets gain fast healing (scaling as the base spell) and immunity to bleed damage, critical hits, sneak attacks, and other precision damage. The epic version greatly extends the duration.
spells.reconstruction_note: The base spell fields and effect are standard PF1e. The extended durations are transcribed from the two epic lists.

spells.name: Divine True Name
spells.target_area: One creature the caster knows through magical means (wording uncertain)
spells.rules_text: An advanced form of Divine Name. It requires a 50,000 gp sacrifice and appears to require the caster to magically know or identify the target.
spells.reconstruction_note: Cost and target prerequisite are direct, but the exact wording after “must magically…” is faint.

spells.name: Word of the Dead
spells.rules_text: Controls 1d4 master undead. No controlled undead can be more than 4 Hit Dice above the caster’s caster level.
spells.reconstruction_note: Control quantity and HD restriction are direct. Other fields are absent.

spells.name: Armor of the Mass
spells.rules_text: Each target gains a +4 luck bonus to AC, a +4 luck bonus on saving throws, and 20 additional hit points.
spells.reconstruction_note: Target count, bonuses, hit points, and duration are direct.

spells.name: Ray of Destruction
spells.target_area: One creature struck by a ranged touch attack (direct)
spells.saving_throw: Fortitude partial: on a successful save, damage is 10d10 (direct)
spells.rules_text: A ray requiring a ranged touch attack. On a failed Fortitude save, it deals 2d10 points of damage per caster level with no maximum. On a successful save, it deals 10d10 damage.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, attack type, damage, no maximum, and save result are direct.

spells.name: Create Roaming Hungry Pit
spells.saving_throw: Reflex avoids falling; Reflex half against crushing damage (reconstructed)
spells.rules_text: Creates a hungry pit 10 feet deep per caster level, to a maximum depth of 300 feet. The pit has a 40-foot radius and can roam up to 80 feet when directed with a move action.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, radius, movement, depth, and maximum depth are direct. Other fields combine roaming pit and hungry pit.

spells.name: Epic Finger of Death
spells.saving_throw: The note says “save vs. death” for targets with HD no greater than caster level; a successful Will save reduces the result to 10d6 damage
spells.rules_text: Against a target whose Hit Dice do not exceed the caster level, a failed death save kills the target. The note also states that the spell deals 10 damage per caster level with no maximum and allows a Will save for 10d6 damage. Because two save clauses are written, GM clarification is recommended.
spells.reconstruction_note: All damage and save wording is directly transcribed; the interaction between the two saves is ambiguous.

spells.name: Elemental Burst
spells.rules_text: Deals 1d10 points of damage per caster level, maximum 30d10. Choose acid, cold, electricity, or fire when the spell is learned; that choice is permanent for that version of the spell.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, area, damage, cap, energy choices, selection timing, and save are direct.

spells.name: Force Blast
spells.rules_text: Deals 1d6 points of force damage per caster level, maximum 30d6.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, radius, damage, cap, and no-save clause are direct.

spells.name: Epic Dispel Magic
spells.rules_text: Attempts to dispel all magical effects in the area and grants a +4 bonus on all dispel checks.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, area, universal dispel intent, and +4 bonus are direct. Other fields follow dispel magic.

spells.name: Fog of Death II
spells.rules_text: Functions as Fog of Death, but the cloud is roaming. The movement rate and action needed to direct it are not written.
spells.reconstruction_note: The only direct change is that the fog roams; other fields inherit Fog of Death.

spells.name: Epic Hold Monster
spells.saving_throw: Will negates; the target receives only one save attempt (direct)
spells.rules_text: Paralyzes the target as hold monster. The target attempts its Will save only once rather than receiving repeated saves.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, duration, and one-save clause are direct. Other fields follow hold monster.

spells.name: Epic Mage Armor
spells.rules_text: Grants a +20 armor bonus to AC.
spells.reconstruction_note: Bonus and duration are direct. Other fields follow mage armor.

spells.name: Form of Giant IV
spells.rules_text: Transforms the caster to Colossal size and grants +10 Strength, +10 Constitution, -6 Dexterity, and +10 natural armor.
spells.reconstruction_note: Size and adjustments are direct; other fields follow giant form.

spells.name: Absorb Energy
spells.rules_text: Choose one energy type when the spell is cast. Damage of that type heals the subject instead of harming it.
spells.reconstruction_note: Duration and healing conversion are direct. Range and target are not written.

spells.name: Epic Mirage Arcana
spells.target_area: Terrain-scale area; exact size not specified
spells.duration: Concentration + 1 hour/level or as mirage arcana (reconstructed)
spells.rules_text: Changes the terrain as mirage arcana and can fill the illusion with apparent troops and traps. The troops and traps deal damage unless the effect is resisted or disbelieved.
spells.reconstruction_note: Custom troops/traps effect is direct. Other fields follow mirage arcana.

spells.name: Firestorm III
spells.rules_text: Functions as Firestorm II but persists for 2d6 rounds. It otherwise inherits the 20d6 damage and area of Firestorm I.
spells.reconstruction_note: Duration change is direct; remaining fields inherit the earlier versions.

spells.name: Perfect Restoration
spells.rules_text: Restores lost limbs and lost levels, removes curses, heals poison and disease, and removes the curse of undeath.
spells.reconstruction_note: All listed restorative effects are direct. Other fields follow greater restoration.

spells.name: Epic Heal II
spells.range: Short: 25 ft. + 5 ft./level (inherited from Epic Heal)
spells.saving_throw: Will half when used offensively; harmless otherwise
spells.rules_text: Heals 30 hit points per caster level, maximum 1,000 hit points.
spells.reconstruction_note: Healing amount and cap are direct. Other fields inherit Epic Heal.

spells.name: Mass Harm
spells.rules_text: Applies the harm spell to one target per caster level.
spells.reconstruction_note: Target count and base-spell reference are direct.

spells.name: Epic Harm II
spells.range: Short: 25 ft. + 5 ft./level (inherited from Epic Harm)
spells.rules_text: Deals 30 points of negative-energy damage per caster level, maximum 1,000 hit points.
spells.reconstruction_note: Damage amount and cap are direct. Other fields inherit Epic Harm.

spells.name: Bane of the Dead
spells.rules_text: Destroys every undead creature with 20 Hit Dice or fewer in the blast.
spells.reconstruction_note: Range, area, HD threshold, no-save clause, and SR are direct.

spells.name: Gaia’s Wrath
spells.range: A 5,000-ft.-long path beginning in front of the caster (direct)
spells.rules_text: Creates a tear in the earth that begins in front of the caster and travels 5,000 feet. The tear is 100 feet across. Creatures in the area that fail a Reflex save are trapped as by imprisonment. Buildings automatically fail; buildings only partly caught in the area take 10d10 damage.
spells.reconstruction_note: All major area and effect mechanics are direct. School and supporting fields are suggested.

spells.name: Healing Aura
spells.target_area: You and allies in the aura
spells.rules_text: The caster gains fast healing 20. Allies within 30 feet also gain fast healing 20 while they remain in the aura.
spells.reconstruction_note: Duration, caster benefit, radius, ally benefit, and fast-healing value are direct.

spells.name: Amelia’s Light
spells.rules_text: Creates magical daylight in a 1,000-foot radius and counters magical darkness.
spells.reconstruction_note: Radius, duration, and countering effect are direct. Other fields follow daylight.

spells.name: Nyx’s Gift
spells.duration: Not written; 1 minute/level is a reasonable parallel to Amelia’s Light but requires GM confirmation
spells.rules_text: Counters magical light and creates magical darkness in a 1,000-foot radius.
spells.reconstruction_note: Countering effect and radius are direct. Duration is absent from the note.

spells.name: Epic Iron Skin
spells.rules_text: Grants a +14 natural armor bonus.
spells.reconstruction_note: Bonus and duration are direct. Other fields follow iron skin.
